title: Internal Dashboard UI Overhaul – Collapsibles, Ticket Actions, Task Management, Client List, GMV Cards, Autocomplete

requirements.summary: Wrap each Superadmin sub-dashboard in a Collapsible component with defaultOpen=true
acceptanceCriteria: Superadmin view renders AdminUser, AdminFinance, Asistenmu, and Concierge dashboards each inside their own Collapsible
Each Collapsible is open by default (defaultOpen)
Clicking a collapsible trigger toggles the visibility of that sub-dashboard
Dashboard names are shown as CardTitle in the CollapsibleTrigger

file_operations.description: Import Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, and CollapsibleContent from the Shadcn UI components. In the SuperadminDashboard component, wrap each existing sub-dashboard section (AdminUserDashboard, AdminFinanceDashboard, AsistenmuDashboard, ConciergeDashboard) in a Collapsible component with defaultOpen=true. Place each dashboard's name (e.g., 'Admin User', 'Admin Finance', 'Asistenmu', 'Concierge') as a CardTitle inside a CardHeader within the CollapsibleTrigger. The CollapsibleContent should contain the respective dashboard component.

requirements.summary: Add Progress and Resolve action buttons to AdminUser ticket list with mandatory notes
acceptanceCriteria: Each ticket row in AdminUser dashboard shows Progress and Resolve buttons
Clicking Progress opens a notes input area; submission is blocked until notes are filled
Clicking Resolve opens a modal with a mandatory Textarea for notes and a 'Resolve Tiket' button
The Resolve modal cannot be confirmed while notes field is empty
After confirmation, the modal closes and the ticket status updates accordingly in local state

file_operations.description: In the AdminUserDashboard component's ticket list table, add two new Button components ('Progress' and 'Resolve') to each ticket row. For Progress: add local state to show/hide an inline Textarea for notes; disable the submit action until notes are non-empty. For Resolve: add state for a Dialog/Modal component (using Shadcn Dialog) that opens on click, containing a mandatory Textarea for notes and a 'Resolve Tiket' Button; disable the resolve button when notes are empty. On confirmation, close the modal and update the ticket's status in local mock state.

requirements.summary: Add 'Client Terkait' collapsible section with client table below Asistenmu summary cards
acceptanceCriteria: Summary cards appear at the top of the Asistenmu dashboard
A 'Client Terkait' collapsible section appears directly below summary cards
The table inside has columns: ID Layanan, Tipe Layanan, Nama Client, Status Layanan, Unit Aktif, Share Layanan
The section is open by default
Mock data is used to populate the table rows

file_operations.description: In the AsistenmuDashboard component, immediately below the existing summary cards section, add a new Collapsible component with defaultOpen=true and a CollapsibleTrigger displaying 'Client Terkait' as a CardTitle inside a CardHeader. Inside the CollapsibleContent, render a Table component with columns: ID Layanan, Tipe Layanan, Nama Client, Status Layanan, Unit Aktif, Share Layanan. Add mock client data (array of objects) to local state and map over it to populate the table rows.

requirements.summary: Consolidate task status cards into a 'Task Management' section and add 'Delegasikan Ulang' modal for rejected tasks
acceptanceCriteria: A single 'Task Management' collapsible section contains all 6 status sub-cards
Tasks are filtered per sub-card by their status value
Tasks in 'Ditolak Partner' sub-card have a 'Delegasikan Ulang' button
Clicking 'Delegasikan Ulang' opens a modal with all delegation fields pre-filled
All fields except the Partner selection are read-only in that modal
Submitting the modal only requires selecting a new partner

file_operations.description: In the AsistenmuDashboard component, replace the individual task status cards (Permintaan Baru, QA Asistenmu, Revisi Client, Ditolak Partner, Review Client, Selesai) with a single Collapsible component labeled 'Task Management' (defaultOpen=true). Inside, render each status as a sub-Card component, filtering mock tasks by status. For tasks in the 'Ditolak Partner' sub-card, add a 'Delegasikan Ulang' Button. When clicked, open a Dialog/Modal displaying all task delegation fields (pre-filled with the task's existing data from mock state); make all fields read-only except for a Partner selection dropdown. On submit, update the task's partner in local state and close the modal.

requirements.summary: Add Progress and Resolve action buttons to Asistenmu ticket list with mandatory notes
acceptanceCriteria: Asistenmu ticket list rows each have Progress and Resolve buttons
Progress action requires mandatory notes before submitting
Resolve opens a modal with a mandatory notes Textarea and a 'Resolve Tiket' button
The Resolve button in the modal is disabled when notes are empty
After confirming, the modal closes and ticket status updates in local state

file_operations.description: In the AsistenmuDashboard component's ticket list table, add two Button components ('Progress' and 'Resolve') to each ticket row. For Progress: add local state to toggle an inline Textarea for notes; require notes to be non-empty before allowing submission. For Resolve: add state for a Dialog/Modal (using Shadcn Dialog) that opens on click, containing a mandatory Textarea for notes and a 'Resolve Tiket' Button; disable the resolve button when notes are empty. On confirmation, close the modal and update the ticket's status in local mock state.

requirements.summary: Replace AdminFinance GMV summary cards with per-service-type GMV cards for Tenang, Rapi, Fokus, Jaga, Efisien
acceptanceCriteria: AdminFinance dashboard shows 5 GMV summary cards labeled Tenang, Rapi, Fokus, Jaga, Efisien
Each card shows a mock GMV value for that service type
Old GMV breakdown (virtual/concierge) is removed

file_operations.description: In the AdminFinanceDashboard component, locate the existing GMV summary cards section (which currently shows virtual/concierge breakdown). Replace those cards with 5 new Card components, one for each service type: Tenang, Rapi, Fokus, Jaga, and Efisien. Each card should display a CardTitle with the service type name and a CardContent area showing a mock GMV value (e.g., 'Rp 50,000,000'). Remove any references to the old virtual/concierge GMV structure.

requirements.summary: Replace client dropdown in Aktivasi Layanan form with autocomplete search input
acceptanceCriteria: Client selection in Aktivasi Layanan uses an autocomplete search input instead of a dropdown
Typing in the field filters a dropdown list of suggestions by client name, user ID, or principal ID
Selecting a suggestion fills the client field with the chosen client's data
The rest of the form fields (Tipe Layanan, Unit Layanan, Harga per Unit, Tanggal Mulai, Sharing Layanan) remain unchanged

file_operations.description: In the AdminFinanceDashboard component, locate the 'Aktivasi Layanan' form section. Replace the client selection dropdown (Select component) with an Input component that supports autocomplete. Add local state for the search query and filtered client suggestions. As the user types, filter the mock client list by matching name, user ID, or principal ID. Display matching suggestions in a dropdown overlay (using a Popover or Command component from Shadcn UI if available, or a simple absolutely positioned div). When a suggestion is clicked, populate the client field with the selected client's data. Leave all other form fields (Tipe Layanan, Unit Layanan, Harga per Unit, Tanggal Mulai, Sharing Layanan) unchanged.

requirements.summary: Add Progress and Resolve action buttons to AdminFinance ticket list with mandatory notes
acceptanceCriteria: AdminFinance ticket list rows each have Progress and Resolve buttons
Progress action requires a mandatory notes textarea before confirming
Resolve opens a modal with a mandatory notes Textarea and a 'Resolve Tiket' button
The Resolve button is disabled when notes are empty
After confirming, modal closes and ticket status updates in local state

file_operations.description: In the AdminFinanceDashboard component's ticket list table, add two Button components ('Progress' and 'Resolve') to each ticket row. For Progress: add local state to show/hide an inline Textarea for notes; disable the submit action until notes are non-empty. For Resolve: add state for a Dialog/Modal (using Shadcn Dialog) that opens on click, containing a mandatory Textarea for notes and a 'Resolve Tiket' Button; disable the resolve button when notes are empty. On confirmation, close the modal and update the ticket's status in local mock state.
